title: Hiring Store Manager at Dulux Decorator Centre

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Dulux Decorator Centre
jsonLd.description:
We at Dulux Decorator Centre are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dulux Decorator Centre:
Dulux Decorator Centre is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dulux Decorator Centre!
